allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Length, Mode; Write-Output "---"; \(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Measure-Object\).Count)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T app sh -lc "curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'interne HTTP %{http_code}\\n' http://localhost/login || echo 'curl absent'")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T app php artisan tinker --execute="echo 'Quotes: '.\\App\\Models\\Quote::withoutGlobalScopes\(\)->count\(\).PHP_EOL; echo 'Invoices: '.\\App\\Models\\Invoice::withoutGlobalScopes\(\)->count\(\).PHP_EOL; \\$i=\\App\\Models\\Invoice::withoutGlobalScopes\(\)->first\(\); echo 'Inv '.\\$i->number.' TTC='.\\$i->total_ttc.' paye='.\\$i->paid_amount.' statut='.\\$i->status.PHP_EOL; \\$q=\\App\\Models\\Quote::withoutGlobalScopes\(\)->where\('status','accepted'\)->first\(\); echo 'Quote '.\\$q->number.' TTC='.\\$q->total_ttc.' lignes='.\\$q->lines\(\)->count\(\).PHP_EOL;")
Bash("USE artisanflow; SELECT id,name,email,role,is_active FROM users WHERE email=\\"jean.test@example.com\\";")
Bash("USE artisanflow; SELECT q.number, q.status, \(SELECT number FROM invoices WHERE quote_id=q.id\) AS facture FROM quotes q WHERE q.id=2;")
Bash("USE artisanflow; SELECT id,name,modules FROM roles;")
